tiles.title: Ceramic Blue Tile
tiles.description: Premium ceramic tile with deep ocean blue glaze finish. Perfect for bathrooms and kitchen backsplashes. Inspired by Mediterranean coastlines.
tiles.creator: ArtisanCraft Studio
tiles.style: Mediterranean coastal inspired with hand-applied glaze for unique variations in each piece.

tiles.title: Terracotta Earth Tile
tiles.description: Handcrafted terracotta tile with warm earth tones. Each tile is unique, fired at high temperatures for durability.
tiles.creator: Terra Artisans
tiles.style: Traditional Moroccan artistry blended with contemporary design sensibilities.

tiles.title: Geometric Black & White
tiles.description: Bold geometric pattern in classic black and white. Creates stunning visual effects when laid in large spaces.
tiles.creator: ModernTile Co.
tiles.style: Art Deco inspired geometric precision for statement floors and walls.

tiles.title: Marble Effect Luxe
tiles.description: High-end porcelain tile with realistic marble veining. Combines the beauty of natural marble with the durability of porcelain.
tiles.creator: LuxuryTile House
tiles.style: Italian-inspired marble aesthetics digitally printed with sub-zero precision.

tiles.title: Forest Green Mosaic
tiles.description: Small format mosaic tiles in rich forest green. Perfect for feature walls, shower niches, and decorative borders.
tiles.creator: Mosaic Dreams
tiles.style: Japanese zen garden aesthetics translated into architectural surfaces.

tiles.title: Cement Patterned Heritage
tiles.description: Encaustic cement tile with traditional hand-poured patterns. Each tile is individually crafted preserving ancient techniques.
tiles.creator: Heritage Craft
tiles.style: Victorian-era encaustic revival with modern color palettes for the contemporary home.

tiles.title: Sage Subway Tile
tiles.description: Classic subway tile format in calming sage green. Versatile design that works in kitchens, bathrooms, and beyond.
tiles.creator: Classic Tile Works
tiles.style: New York subway station heritage reimagined for the modern domestic interior.

tiles.title: Himalayan Pink Slate
tiles.description: Natural slate tile with distinctive pink Himalayan tones. Each piece is a unique geological specimen.
tiles.creator: Stone Origins
tiles.style: Raw geological beauty from the Himalayas brought into the contemporary living space.

tiles.title: Midnight Onyx Porcelain
tiles.description: Deep black porcelain tile with subtle gold veining. Provides a sophisticated and dramatic look for luxury interiors.
tiles.creator: LuxuryTile House
tiles.style: Contemporary dark luxury with a polished high-gloss finish.

tiles.title: Sandstone Desert Plank
tiles.description: Textured sandstone effect tiles that bring the warmth of the desert into your living room or patio.
tiles.creator: Stone Origins
tiles.style: Rustic outdoor-inspired aesthetics for seamless indoor-outdoor living.

tiles.title: Azure Hexagon Mosaic
tiles.description: Small hexagonal mosaic tiles in varying shades of azure. Ideal for creating a water-like effect in pools or showers.
tiles.creator: Mosaic Dreams
tiles.style: Geometric blue patterns inspired by the deep Aegean sea.

tiles.title: Golden Ochre Terracotta
tiles.description: Sun-drenched ochre tiles fired in traditional kilns for an authentic Mediterranean feel.
tiles.creator: Terra Artisans
tiles.style: Spanish colonial heritage meet modern durable ceramic engineering.

tiles.title: Abstract Teal Geometric
tiles.description: Contemporary teal tiles with overlapping geometric circles. A true conversation piece for feature walls.
tiles.creator: ModernTile Co.
tiles.style: Mid-century modern patterns reimagined with vibrant teal glazes.

tiles.title: Industrial Grey Cement
tiles.description: Minimalist raw cement tiles with a smooth matte finish. Perfect for industrial-style lofts and studios.
tiles.creator: Heritage Craft
tiles.style: Brutalist architectural inspiration for clean and open spaces.

tiles.title: Rose Quartz Marble
tiles.description: Soft pink marble with delicate white veins. Adds a touch of romantic elegance to vanities and bathrooms.
tiles.creator: LuxuryTile House
tiles.style: Feminine luxury with a satin-smooth natural stone surface.

tiles.title: Vintage Moroccan Patchwork
tiles.description: A mix of traditional Moroccan patterns in a single collection. Perfect for kitchen islands and floors.
tiles.creator: Heritage Craft
tiles.style: Eclectic bohemian design celebrating historical North African art.

tiles.title: Smoky Quartz Glass Mosaic
tiles.description: Iridescent glass mosaic tiles that change color with the light. Ideal for high-end spa areas.
tiles.creator: Mosaic Dreams
tiles.style: Reflective luxury designed to interact with ambient lighting.

tiles.title: Pearl White Subway
tiles.description: Ultra-glossy white subway tiles with a subtle pearl finish. A timeless choice for any kitchen.
tiles.creator: Classic Tile Works
tiles.style: Contemporary minimalist update to the classic brick-bond pattern.
